data.title: 国际服4.5周年预更新礼物
data.summary: The long-awaited 4.5th Anniversary pre-registration page will open soon! We've prepared a special gi
data.body:
The long-awaited 4.5th Anniversary pre-registration page will open soon!

We've prepared a special gift to make this moment even more exciting — check out the 'Pre-Registration Special Coupon Code' in the announcement~

➡️Details: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3218&thread=3430931
